properties.titulo_evento: US general holds rare meeting with Cuban military officials near Guantanamo Bay
properties.descricao: The meeting is the first in recent memory by a head of U.S. Southern Command and comes amid growing concerns in Cuba of a possible U.S. military attack.

properties.descricao: A Russian drone wounded two civilians in Romania on Friday, days after Lithuania detailed how Moscow is also steering Ukraine's drones onto allied soil.

properties.descricao: Democrat Ro Khanna and Republican Thomas Massie say they will try to remove the pro-Israel section from US defence bill.

properties.descricao: Production restored at three offshore platforms after Israeli attacks, Pars Oil and Gas Company CEO tells Iranian media.

properties.descricao: The former Colombian president reflects on peace, conflict and the return of violence.

properties.descricao: Nearly 800 people were arrested after clashes with police which saw 219 people injured, including 57 police officers.

properties.descricao: After a day of uncertainty, the government confirms the team will depart for Mexico on Monday.

properties.descricao: The technology, developed under the Aukus military pact, is aimed at protecting undersea cables and boosting naval defence.

properties.titulo_evento: Vingegaard completes Grand Tour set with victory at the Giro d'Italia
properties.descricao: Denmark's Jonas Vingegaard won the 2026 Giro d'Italia on Sunday to become only the eighth male rider in history to win all three Grand Tours, having also won the Tour de France twice before his triumph at the Vuelta a Espana last year.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany news: Most expect AfD state premier after elections

properties.descricao: The Alevis make up the fourth largest religious community in Germany today. What are the main tenets of their faith? And how are they preserving their unique culture?
